linkedin_company_description.content:
Jiangsu Hengdu Phase Change Technology Co., Ltd.

🌐 Website: https://tenggua2.github.io/hendo-tech/

We are the world's first manufacturer of screw-extruded A2 non-combustible aluminum composite panels (ACP). 

Our proprietary screw-extrusion technology produces A2 core material with ZERO water absorption — solving the fire safety problem that traditional ACP panels face.

✅ Fire Rating: A2-s1,d0 (EN 13501-1)
✅ 6 International Certifications: CE, SGS, TUV, ASTM, Singapore CWCL, Intertek
✅ Daily Capacity: 5,000 sqm panels / 200 tons granules / 50 tons rolls
✅ Export Markets: Southeast Asia, Middle East, Europe, North America, Australia

Products:
• A2 Metal Composite Panel (finished panels for architects & contractors)
• A2 Core Granules (raw material for ACP manufacturers)
• A2 Core Rolls (continuous core material for ACP manufacturers)

Contact: Lex Teng (Marketing Director)
Email: tenggua2@163.com
WhatsApp: +86 158 0081 2660

press_release.title: Hengdu Technology Achieves Breakthrough in A2 Non-Combustible Aluminum Composite Panel with Zero Water Absorption
press_release.content:
FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE

Hengdu Technology Achieves Breakthrough in A2 Non-Combustible Aluminum Composite Panel with Zero Water Absorption

SUQIAN, China — Jiangsu Hengdu Phase Change Technology Co., Ltd. (Hengdu Technology) announced today that its proprietary screw-extrusion A2 core technology has achieved zero water absorption in aluminum composite panels — a significant advancement in building facade fire safety.

Traditional A2-rated aluminum composite panels still absorb moisture, which can compromise fire safety performance over time. Hengdu's patented screw-extrusion process produces A2 core material that absorbs no water, maintaining consistent fire resistance throughout the panel's service life.

The panels are certified to EN 13501-1 A2-s1,d0 — the highest fire safety rating for combustible building materials in the EU. The company holds 6 international certifications: CE, SGS, TUV, ASTM, Singapore CWCL, and Intertek.

"We are the first in the world to achieve zero water absorption in A2 core material at industrial scale," said Lex Teng, Marketing Director at Hengdu Technology. "This solves a fundamental problem in the industry."

Hengdu's production capacity includes:
• 2 A2 panel production lines (5,000 sqm/day)
• 8 A2 core granule lines (200 tons/day)
• 1 A2 core roll line (50 tons/day)

The company exports to Southeast Asia, the Middle East, Europe, North America, and Australia.

About Hengdu Technology:
Jiangsu Hengdu Phase Change Technology Co., Ltd. is a manufacturer of A2 non-combustible aluminum composite panels, A2 core granules, and A2 core rolls. The company's proprietary screw-extrusion technology represents a breakthrough in building facade fire safety.

Media Contact:
Lex Teng, Marketing Director
Email: tenggua2@163.com
Phone: +86 158 0081 2660
Website: https://tenggua2.github.io/hendo-tech/
